ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the product line was launched */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the product line is associated with (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "collection" TEXT /* Collection the product line belongs to (e.g., Main, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the garment (e.g., T-shirt, Jacket) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the garment (e.g., Men's, Women's) */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line the garment belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the garment */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the garment */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range for the garment (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the garment (e.g., Cotton, Polyester, Leather) */,
  "target_age_group" TEXT /* Target age group for the garment (e.g., Children, Adults, Seniors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of measurements */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment the measurements belong to */,
  "collar" REAL /* Collar measurement in inches */,
  "chest_circumference" REAL /* Chest circumference measurement in inches */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Waist circumference measurement in inches */,
  "hem_width_circumference" REAL /* Hem width circumference measurement in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "sleeves_length" REAL /* Sleeves length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment in the inventory */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the garment is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the garment */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment being produced */,
  "raw_materials" TEXT /* List of raw materials used in production (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current status of the production (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the production started */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the production was completed */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the production process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., Online, In-Store, Wholesale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production manager, inventory clerk, sales team) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_versions" (
  "design_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design version */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment the design version belongs to */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the design version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_versions_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_versions_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment the specification belongs to */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., Material, Length, Width) */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "specification_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification (e.g., inches, centimeters, grams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specifications_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_drawings" (
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drawing */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment the drawing belongs to */,
  "drawing_name" TEXT /* Name of the drawing (e.g., Front View, Back View) */,
  "drawing_file" TEXT /* Binary file containing the drawing */,
  "drawing_type" TEXT /* Type of drawing (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_drawings_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)
